items.title: Stock market today: Dow, S&P 500, Nasdaq edge higher after big ADP jobs miss
items.description: US stocks inched higher as Wall Street largely shrugged off tariff risks, even as President Trump doubled duties on steel and aluminum imports.

items.title: QQQ Attracts $572M in Assets as Markets Start June Higher
items.description: - QQQ led ETF inflows on Friday despite global trade tensions. - SPY and VGT experienced outflows as markets saw a slight gain.

items.title: Stock market today: Dow, S&P 500, Nasdaq rise as Nvidia jumps to highest since January
items.description: An OECD warning of economic damage from President Trump's tariffs has put investors on watch for progress in US trade talks.

items.title: Wall Street strategists see another 10% rally for the S&P 500 in 2025
items.description: Wall Street strategists are upgrading their outlook for the S&P 500 as tariffs aren't expected to weigh on corporate earnings as much as initially feared.
